Chronology
2023 in KSW 2024 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2025 in KSW

The year 2024 was the 20th anniversary of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland.

List of events

[edit]
# Event Title Date Arena Location
1 XTB KSW 90: Wrzosek vs. Vitasović January 20, 2024 Arena COS Torwar Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW 91: Brichta vs. Mircea February 17, 2024 Home Credit Arena Liberec, Czech Republic

5 XTB KSW 93: Parnasse vs. Mircea April 6, 2024 Adidas Arena Paris, France

13 XTB KSW 101: Le Classique December 20, 2024 Paris La Défense Arena Nanterre, France

KSW Light Heavyweight Tournament

[edit]

Background

[edit]

On January 16, 2024, KSW announced a light heavyweight tournament to select the category's next champion. Participants of the tournament included Rafał Haratyk, Damian Piwowarczyk, Kleber Raimundo Silva and Marcin Wójcik.

Semifinal Final
      
Rafał Haratyk TKO
Marcin Wójcik 1
Rafał Haratyk SD
Damian Piwowarczyk 3
Kleber Raimundo Silva 1
Damian Piwowarczyk KO

XTB KSW 90: Wrzosek vs. Vitasović

[edit]
XTB KSW 90: Wrzosek vs. Vitasović
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJanuary 20, 2024
VenueArena COS Torwar
City Warsaw, Poland

XTB KSW 90: Wrzosek vs. Vitasović was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on January 20, 2024, in Warsaw, Poland.

Background

[edit]

A heavyweight bout between Arkadiusz Wrzosek and current FNC Heavyweight champion Ivan Vitasović headlined the event.[1][2][3]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Submission of the Night: Ewelina Woźniak and Isai Ramos
  • Knockout of the Night: Laïd Zerhouni and Adam Soldaev

Fight card

[edit]
KSW 90
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes

Middleweight 84 kg Laïd Zerhouni def. Bartosz Fabiński KO (Punches) 1 0:12
Featherweight 66 kg Adam Soldaev def. Damian Stasiak KO (Punch) 2 1:08
Catchweight 73 kg Isai Ramos def. Ramzan Jembiev Submission (Armbar) 1 0:47
Bantamweight 61 kg Oleksii Polischuck def. Werlleson Martins KO (Punches) 2 0:50
Women's Strawweight 52 kg Ewelina Woźniak def. Aleksandra Toncheva Submission (Reverse Triangle Choke) 2 1:56

Lightweight 70 kg Hugo Deux def. Gino van Steenis Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Lightweight 70 kg Szymon Karolczyk def. Artur Krawczyk Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 2 4:54

KSW 91: Brichta vs. Mircea

[edit]
KSW 91: Brichta vs. Mircea
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateFebruary 17, 2024
VenueHome Credit Arena
City Liberec, Czech Republic

KSW 91: Brichta vs. Mircea was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on February 17, 2024, at the Home Credit Arena in Liberec, Czech Republic.

Background

[edit]

The event was the KSW's third visit to the Czech Republic, and the second to the city of Liberec.[4]

In December 2023, KSW announced that number 2 contender Valeriu Mircea and number 3 contender and Czech MMA star Leo Brichta will fight for the interim KSW Lightweight Championship in the main event.[5]

During the gala, local fighters Dominik Humburger and Josef Štummer returned to the cage.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Valeriu Mircea vs. Leo Brichta
  • Submission of the Night: Josef Štummer
  • Knockout of the Night: Wiktoria Czyżewska

Fight card

[edit]
KSW 91
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight 70 kg Valeriu Mircea def. Leo Brichta Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 4 2:40 For the interim KSW Lightweight Championship
Middleweight 84 kg Dominik Humburger def. Adrian Dudek KO (Punches) 2 2:28
Welterweight 77 kg Matúš Juráček def. Henry Fadipe KO (Punches) 1 4:00
Welterweight 77 kg Kacper Koziorzębski def. Viktor Červinsky Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 68 kg Łukasz Charzewski def. Michał Sobiech Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Dawid Kasperski def. Vasil Ducar Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Josef Štummer def. Adrian Wieliczko Submission (Triangle Choke) 2 4:20
Bantamweight 61 kg Mariusz Joniak def. Tobiasz Le TKO (Punches) 1 1:05
Women's Flyweight 56 kg Wiktoria Czyżewska def. Petra Častkova KO (Kick to the Body) 1 1:56

XTB KSW Epic: Khalidov vs. Adamek

[edit]
XTB KSW Epic: Khalidov vs. Adamek
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateFebruary 24, 2024
VenueGliwice Arena
City Gliwice, Poland

XTB KSW Epic: Khalidov vs. Adamek was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on February 24, 2024, at the Gliwice Arena in Gliwice, Poland.

Background

[edit]

To celebrate the twentieth anniversary of the KSW brand, the XTB KSW Epic gala was announced.[6]

On January 16, 2024, KSW announced tournament in Light heavyweight category that will select next champion in that category as Ibragim Chuzhigaev vacated belt in December. Participants of the tournament are Rafał Haratyk, Damian Piwowarczyk, Kleber Raimundo Silva and Marcin Wójcik.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Muslim Tulshaev vs. Konrad Rusiński
  • Knockout of the Night: Ivan Erslan and Damian Piwowarczyk

Fight card

[edit]
KSW Epic
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Catchweight 99kg Tomasz Adamek def. Mamed Khalidov TKO (Hand Injury) 3 3:00 Boxing fight
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Rafał Haratyk def. Damian Piwowarczyk Decision (Split) 3 5:00 KSW Light Heavyweight Tournament Final. For the vacant KSW Light Heavyweight Championship.
Heavyweight 120 kg Phil De Fries vs. Josh Barnett Draw 1 10:00 Submission Fighting
Featherweight 66 kg Václav Sivák def. Michal Krolik Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00 Muay Thai with MMA gloves
Heavyweight 120 kg Darko Stošić def. Matheus Scheffel TKO (Punches) 1 1:12 Pride rules
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Rafał Haratyk def. Marcin Wójcik TKO (Punches) 1 4:05 KSW Light Heavyweight Tournament Semifinal.
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Damian Piwowarczyk def. Kleber Raimundo Silva KO (Punch to the Body) 1 2:34 KSW Light Heavyweight Tournament Semifinal.
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Ivan Erslan def. Bohdan Gnidko KO (Punch) 1 0:54
Catchweight 82 kg Muslim Tulshaev def. Konrad Rusiński TKO (Soccer Kicks) 3 0:32 No Holds Barred
Lightweight 70 kg Piotr Kacprzak def. Adam Brysz TKO (Punches) 1 1:16 MMA in Kimono

XTB KSW 92: Wikłacz vs. Jojua was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on March 16, 2024 at the Arena Gorzów in Gorzów Wielkopolski. Poland.

Background

[edit]

A KSW Bantamweight Championship bout between reigning champion Jakub Wikłacz and #2 contender Zuriko Jojua headlined the event.[7]

XTB KSW 93: Parnasse vs. Mircea

[edit]
XTB KSW 93: Parnasse vs. Mircea
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateApril 6, 2024
VenueAdidas Arena
City Paris, France

XTB KSW 93: Parnasse vs. Mircea was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on April 6, 2024 , at the Adidas Arena in Paris, France.

Background

[edit]

This event will mark the organization's debut in France.[8]

An unification KSW Lightweight Championship bout between reigning two-division champion Salahdine Parnasse and interim champion Valeriu Mircea headlined the event.

A lightweight bout between Ramzan Jembiev and the promotional newcomer El Hadji Ndiaye was scheduled to take place at the event.[9] However, Jembiev withdrew due to shoulder injury and was replaced in short notice by Nicolae Bivol.[10]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Submission of the Night:Laïd Zerhouni
  • Knockout of the Night: Michal Martínek, Madars Fleminas and Salahdine Parnasse

Fight card

[edit]
KSW 93
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight 70 kg Salahdine Parnasse (c) def. Valeriu Mircea (ic) KO (Head Kick and Punches) 1 4:00 For the KSW Lightweight Championship
Lightweight 70 kg Wilson Varela def. Marian Ziółkowski TKO (Shoulder Injury) 2 2:31

Women's Flyweight 56 kg Flore Hani def. Sandra Succar Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00

XTB KSW 94: Bartosiński vs. Michaliszyn

[edit]
XTB KSW 94: Bartosiński vs. Michaliszyn
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMay 11, 2024
VenueErgo Arena
City Gdańsk

XTB KSW 94: Bartosiński vs. Michaliszyn was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on May 11, 2024 at the Ergo Arena in Gdańsk, Poland.

Background

[edit]

A rematch for the KSW Welterweight Championship between reigning champion Adrian Bartosiński and #1 contender Andrzej Grzebyk was expected to headline the event. The pairing previously fought at KSW 67 in February 2022, where Bartosiński won via submission in the second round. However, Grzebyk withdrew due to injury and was replaced by #3 contender Igor Michaliszyn.[11]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Daniel Tărchilă vs. Dawid Kareta
  • Submission of the Night: Adrian Bartosiński
  • Knockout of the Night: Robert Ruchała
